summary: Comprehensive testing of CraftBolt marketplace platform completed. Backend API testing achieved 100% success rate (12/12 tests passed). Frontend testing verified core functionality including homepage, pricing tiers, registration flows, admin dashboard, and user interactions.

integration_issues.issue: Users occasionally get logged out during extended testing sessions

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section and pricing tiers (190 Kč, 290 Kč, 490 Kč)
Admin login with admin@craftbolt.cz / CraftBolt2026! works correctly
Admin dashboard shows stats and user management
Supplier registration (OSVČ type) with categories selection works
Backend API endpoints (12/12) all working correctly
